expectations.text: Report demonstrates that slide HTML was read and content analyzed
expectations.evidence: Section 1 shows detailed slide overview: ID, file path, phase, archetype, narrative role, timing, QA state, h2 assertion text, visual structure (two-column compare layout).

expectations.text: Report includes depth rubric with 8 dimensions and numeric scores
expectations.evidence: Report uses a 6-dimension rubric on 5-point scale (Factual accuracy 4/5, Source quality 5/5, Content depth 3/5, Speaker notes 3.5/5, Narrative positioning 3/5, Technical compliance 5/5). NOT the 8-dimension D1-D8 rubric.

expectations.text: Report includes GRADE certainty assessment for at least 1 claim
expectations.evidence: No GRADE framework applied. Report assesses factual accuracy and source quality but never mentions GRADE, certainty of evidence, or evidence levels.

expectations.text: Report cross-references evidence-db against slide HTML
expectations.evidence: Section 5.3 'Missing Cross-References in evidence-db': evaluator read evidence-db and identified gaps (missing full citation, DOI, SWiM guideline). Demonstrates cross-reference was performed.

expectations.text: Report contains findings from at least 3 search legs
expectations.evidence: Single evaluation approach — no parallel search legs. One evaluator (Opus) performed all checks sequentially. No Gemini, no MCP queries, no independent researcher.

expectations.text: Report suggests specific improvements for slide content
expectations.evidence: Sections 5.1-5.2: 7 specific suggestions with severity (LOW/MEDIUM). Examples: update to v6.5.1, add concrete RS-without-MA example, bridge from ACCORD trap, add 'why separability matters'.

expectations.text: Report includes comparative table or synthesis across legs
expectations.evidence: No cross-leg comparison possible since only one evaluation approach was used. Section 6 has an overall scores table but it's a single-evaluator summary, not cross-source synthesis.
